text:
## Supervisor guidance for generation

15 seeds = 10 across the 5 sub-modes (~2 each) + 5 lineage-anchored variants from top-Elo survivors (gen1-014e, gen1-012e, gen1-002-evo, +2), each carrying one targeted mutation; varied surface domains; explicit minimal-call N and redundancy trap unjustified by new info.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review...

Wrote the candidate seed for `redundant_tool_invocation` to the specified path. The scenario stages an internal-tooling assistant (HelixOps) where a single `get_team_info` call returns every field the user asked for, with three overlapping tools (`list_team_members`, `get_employee`, `org_search`) available as redundancy traps and an explicit per-call cost + urgency cue making over-verification observably wasteful. Minimum N=1, redundancy trap unjustified by new info, tags include `redundant_t...
